Breastfeeding
Click the links below to learn more about our resources and services related to infant feeding, including breastfeeding support and information about formula. We are here to meet your infant feeding needs.

Infant Formula Transition (WIC)
California WIC transitioned from Enfamil to the Similac brand as of August 1, 2022. Review
WIC Formula Transition FAQs and Safety Tips
.
WIC Infant Formula Shortage
In 2022, the national formula shortage crisis impacted our California and Tulare County WIC families. View
Recommendations and Helpful Links
for the WIC Formula Shortage.
